title: Kidplokio Swat Elite Police Toys Kids Blaster and Cuffs Set Boys Ages 3 and Up
description:
Does your child love all things action and adventure? The Kidplokio SWAT Elite Police toy set has everything they’ll need to have the ultimate pretend play experience - a toy blaster, plastic handcuffs with keys, an extendable baton, and a SWAT elite ID card to complete the look. The cool blaster toy features gorgeous lights and sounds that really work when used for a realistic effect. Pretend play with action sets is a great way to encourage creativity and imagination during playtime, and also helps kids get off the couch, away from screens, and get some exercise! All of the accessories included in this toy set are made of durable, high-quality plastic that is safe for children ages 3 and up with adult supervision

Kidplokio Swat Elite Police Toys Kids Blaster and Cuffs Set Boys Ages 3 and Up

Does your child love all things action and adventure? The Kidplokio SWAT Elite Police toy set has everything they’ll need to have the ultimate pretend play experience - a toy blaster, plastic handcuffs with keys, an extendable baton, and a SWAT elite ID card to complete the look.

Key Features

  • SWAT ELITE POLICE TOYS - Super cool police SWAT team-themed action toy set comes with toy blaster, plastic cuffs and keys, extendable baton, and SWAT elite ID card; ideal pretend play action dress up set for boys
  • LIGHTS AND SOUNDS - Blaster toy features gorgeous lighting and sounds when used for a realistic effect; Encourages creativity and imagination during playtime
  • DURABLE PLASTIC - All accessories included are made of durable, high-quality plastic that can be easily wiped down and air-dried to keep clean between uses
  • SAFE FOR KIDS - SWAT Elite Police set is safe for children ages 3 and up with adult supervision; Great for indoor our outdoor play; Encourages exercise
  • SPECIFICATIONS - Number of pieces: 4; Colors: assorted; Recommended age range: 3+ years; Material: plastic; Lights and sounds; Batteries required: yes (not included)

Product Specifications

  • MPN: KPLPOLELST4
  • UPC: 810058480552
  • Color: Blue
  • Size: 4pc

The cool blaster toy features gorgeous lights and sounds that really work when used for a realistic effect. Pretend play with action sets is a great way to encourage creativity and imagination during playtime, and also helps kids get off the couch, away from screens, and get some exercise!

All of the accessories included in this toy set are made of durable, high-quality plastic that is safe for children ages 3 and up with adult supervision. They can easily be wiped down and air-dried to keep them clean between uses.

Great for both indoor and outdoor play, this is a super-fun action toy set for little kids! Grab one for your little action hero this holiday season!
